title: Deathifny
description: A Minecraft plugin for tracking deaths with GUI
body:
# 🪦 Deathifny
Advanced Death History & Inventory Restore for Spigot

Deathifny is a powerful yet lightweight plugin that records player deaths in detail and provides a clean, intuitive GUI to view, manage, teleport to, and restore death inventories.

Ideal for SMPs, survival servers, and admin teams that want transparency and control without unnecessary complexity.

## ✨ Features

> 📍 Detailed death tracking

- Death location (world & coordinates)
  
- Exact time & date
  
- Cause of death
  
- Killer (player or mob)
  
- Full inventory snapshot

> 💾 Persistent storage

- All data saved in deaths.yml
  
- Survives restarts & crashes
  
> 🖥️ Modern GUI system

- Paged death list
  
- Left-click → view death inventory
  
- Right-click → teleport to death location
  
- Navigation buttons (next / previous / back / close)
  
> 🎒 Inventory restore

-  View the exact inventory at the time of death
  
-  Restore inventories with one click
  
-  Target player must be online
  
-  Fully permission-protected

> 🌍 Multi-language support

- Server-wide language system
  
- Included: English (en) & German (de)
  
- Easy to add custom languages
  
- Managed via language-config.yml

## 📜 Commands
/deathinfo

> Shows the death history GUI.

/deathinfo → View your own deaths

/deathinfo <player> → View another player’s deaths

/deathinfo clear <player> → Clear all stored deaths of a player

/deathinforeload

> Reloads the plugin/language configuration.

/language <languageCode>

> Shows or changes the server-wide plugin language.

## 
## 🔑 Permissions
- Permission & Description	
- deathifny.info -> View death information and inventory	**(Take items aswell!)**
- deathifny.teleport -> Teleport to death locations	
- deathifny.restore -> Restore death inventories	
- deathifny.clear -> Clear stored death data	
- deathifny.reload -> Reload plugin configuration	
- deathifny.setlanguage -> Change server-wide language	
- All of them are default OP
